plan.title: Attention Is All You Need: The AI Revolution
plan.styleGuide: Color Palette: Dark blues, purples, and deep greys dominate, with vibrant neon accents (cyan, magenta, electric yellow) used for data paths, connections, and highlighted elements. Camera Movement: A continuous, slow, rightward camera pan that seamlessly transitions across all four segments, creating a sense of progression. Lens Style: Slightly wide-angle, cinematic feel with subtle, organic light flares and a shallow depth of field to emphasize foreground elements. On-Screen Text Style: Clean, modern sans-serif font (e.g., 'Exo 2' or 'Oxanium'), bold, with a neon glow effect matching the accent colors. Music Mood: Ethereal, atmospheric, and slightly mysterious, evolving into an optimistic and subtly intense electronic soundscape.
plan.music: Futuristic Ambient Synths with a subtle build-up.

segments.title: The Problem with Old AI Models
segments.visual: A dimly lit digital landscape with abstract, translucent 'sequence' blocks moving left-to-right in a linear fashion, representing sequential data processing. Neon lines connect only adjacent blocks, highlighting their limitations. As the camera pans right, a subtle glitch effect introduces tension.
segments.voiceover: Before 2017, AI processed information sequentially, like reading word-by-word. This was slow and struggled to grasp long-range connections.
segments.transitionInCue: Camera starts pan right, revealing linear data blocks.
segments.transitionOutCue: Camera continues right pan, revealing a large, static title 'ATTENTION IS ALL YOU NEED' in neon glow.

segments.title: Introducing Attention: A New Paradigm
segments.visual: The camera pans right past the neon title 'ATTENTION IS ALL YOU NEED'. The linear blocks from before now break apart, and a web of fine, glowing neon lines (representing 'attention') dynamically connects distant blocks, not just adjacent ones. Focus shifts to one block, showing multiple glowing connections.
segments.voiceover: Then came 'Attention Is All You Need.' This groundbreaking paper introduced a mechanism where models could weigh the importance of different data parts.
segments.transitionInCue: Camera continues right pan, revealing a large, static title 'ATTENTION IS ALL YOU NEED' in neon glow.
segments.transitionOutCue: Camera continues right pan across the dynamic web, highlighting the 'self-attention' concept with a central glowing node emitting connections.

segments.title: Self-Attention and Parallel Processing
segments.visual: The camera continues its rightward pan, focusing on a central glowing 'node' representing a data point. Numerous neon lines (queries, keys, values) radiate from it, connecting to *all* other data points in the visible frame, forming a complex, interwoven network. Some connections brighten, showing high 'attention' scores.
segments.voiceover: This 'self-attention' allows AI to process all information simultaneously, understanding context regardless of distance. This enabled unprecedented parallelization.
segments.transitionInCue: Camera continues right pan across the dynamic web, highlighting the 'self-attention' concept with a central glowing node emitting connections.
segments.transitionOutCue: Camera continues right pan, transitioning from the intricate network to a wider shot of a vast, rapidly building digital city made of interconnected structures.

segments.title: The Transformer's Impact
segments.visual: The camera completes its rightward pan, revealing a vast, rapidly expanding digital cityscape, symbolizing the Transformer architecture's proliferation. Towers glow with neon light, representing various AI applications. The cityscape expands into the distance, suggesting limitless potential.
segments.voiceover: This innovation, called the Transformer architecture, revolutionized AI. It's the foundation for modern large language models, powering tools like GPT and Gemini.
segments.transitionInCue: Camera continues right pan, transitioning from the intricate network to a wider shot of a vast, rapidly building digital city made of interconnected structures.
segments.transitionOutCue: Digital cityscape fades slightly, as the central 'Attention' concept pulses brightly, then fades to black.

Before Attention Is All You Need RNN limitations
